title: Slovakian Pancake Tart
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert combining the best of Slovakian pancakes and a flaky tart crust.
instructions: Roll out the tart crust and place in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
Add cold butter and use a pastry blender or fingers to work into flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sour cream and eggs.
Add vanilla extract and whisk until combined.
Pour sour cream mixture into flour mixture and stir until just combined.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
